problems_encountered.description: SSH public key file not found at /home/nodejs/.ssh/eval-test-key.pub - expected behavior since MCP server doesn't have local SSH keys

tool_response_summary: Failed to import SSH key - file not found in MCP server filesystem
execution_notes: Tool requires local SSH key file which doesn't exist in MCP server environment. This is expected behavior - tool works in CLI environment but not in MCP server context.
